message:
chore: ignore literal tilde directory in .gitignore

Ignore the ~/ directory that gets created by agent mail git mailbox
initialization. This is a runtime artifact containing
.mcp_agent_mail_git_mailbox_repo and should not be tracked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -265,3 +265,6 @@ test_screenshot.png
 
 # Claude Code local settings (contains secrets)
 .claude/settings.local.json
+
+# Literal tilde directory (created by agent mail git mailbox init)
+~/
